reviews.feedback: Correlation ID should always be generated even when x-request-id header is missing. Need a UUID fallback. Also structured logging should use JSON format, not console.error.
Completely ad-hoc. No error classes, no consistent format, leaks MongoDB errors to users.
Good exception hierarchy but structured logging needs JSON formatter. Also external API error wrapping should include the service name and HTTP status from the upstream response.
Bare except clauses, print statements, swallowed exceptions. No error codes at all.
Need at least 15 error codes in the registry. Missing Retry-After for rate limits. Need client handling guidance per category.
No JSON schema, no error codes, no field-level validation details. Just HTTP status codes and strings.
